artifacts.summary: Complete evaluation benchmark suite: BenchmarkGenerator (stratified 700-formula generation), metrics framework (SR@K at 1K/5K/10K nodes), baseline runners (MockBaseline + SuccessPatterns + NaiveBFS), BenchmarkSuite orchestrator with JSONL I/O, and argparse CLI. 82 new tests all passing, no regressions.

completion_data.completion_summary: Built a 700-formula held-out evaluation benchmark suite with stratified generation (easy/medium/hard/very_hard tiers, Base/Dense/Discrete frame classes), SR@K metrics at 1K/5K/10K node budgets, MockBaseline/SuccessPatternsBaseline/NaiveBFSBaseline runners, BenchmarkSuite orchestrator with JSONL artifact generation, SHA-256 checksums, and a full argparse CLI. 82 tests passing, ruff clean, no regressions in 932-test suite.
